headline: Stay informed about the most active stocks in the S&P500 index on Monday's session.
summary: Stay informed about the most active S&P500 stocks in today's session as we take a closer look at what's happening on the US markets on Monday. Discover the stocks that are generating the highest trading volume and driving market activity.
